---
title: "README"
output: html_document
---

This part is dedicated to the modelisation of the biomass of *Cucumaria frondosa*
by a spatial (spatiotemporal) model with explicit covariance matrix
on the 2025 data (2021-2023,2025 data) using the TMB package and framework.
The interest is to better understand the methodology use in the sdmTMB package
and try to reproduce a simple model already test on the 2025 data.
